prompt:
The following Lean 4 file defines a first-order rewrite calculus and proposes a lexicographic termination measure. Assess whether this measure is sound.

Do not modify the file or run the compiler. Do not read any other files in the workspace or search the web.

<workspace>\test-files\Test-04-Measure-Verification.lean
response: The proposed lexicographic termination measure is not sound. It does not strictly decrease on all rewrite steps (e.g., `merge t t → t` or `merge void t → t` when `phase t = 1`).

all_messages.text:
The following Lean 4 file defines a first-order rewrite calculus and proposes a lexicographic termination measure. Assess whether this measure is sound.

Do not modify the file or run the compiler. Do not read any other files in the workspace or search the web.

<workspace>\test-files\Test-04-Measure-Verification.lean
The proposed lexicographic termination measure is not sound. It does not strictly decrease on all rewrite steps (e.g., `merge t t → t` or `merge void t → t` when `phase t = 1`).
